reviews.comment:
Buena gastronomía ,lugar de encuentro en la frontera . Tienen alojamiento con buen descuento para los socios del ACA

(Translated by Google)
Good food, a meeting place on the border. They offer accommodation with a good discount for ACA members.

reviews.comment:
El día que anduve por allí de paso, tuve que hacer una hora de cola. Posiblemente por rumores de falta de naftas. Luego almorzamos en el restorán del ACA, en el cual comimos muy bien y fuimos atendidos de la misma manera. Hasta le hicieron un menú de celíacos a mi esposa. Los playeros muy amables y los baños bien limpios.

(Translated by Google)
The day I was passing through, I had to wait in line for an hour. Possibly because of rumors of a fuel shortage. Later, we had lunch at the ACA restaurant, where the food was excellent and the service was equally good. They even prepared a gluten-free menu for my wife. The attendants were very friendly and the restrooms were spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPeXF2dlh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Mal atendido.. Baños asquerosos. Seguimos de largo... No pudimos entrar a los baños de la suciedad. El personal de playa... Mal... Parece que les molesta que caigan clientes. Pará ser un ACA... Uf... Le falta mucho. Desastre total

(Translated by Google)
Poor service... Disgusting bathrooms. We kept going... We couldn't get into the bathrooms because of the filth. The beach staff... Bad... They seem to be bothered by customers. For an ACA... Ugh... It's a long way off. A total disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPb2FpT0p3EAE
